name: Context Mode
description: Proactive tool-output compression for extended agent session lifetime

threshold.description: Character threshold below which results pass through unchanged

summaryHeadChars.description: Characters to keep from the head of the original output in summaries

agents.description: Per-agent opt-in/opt-out. Omit to enable for all agents.

include.description: If set, only these agent IDs will use context-mode.

exclude.description: If set, these agent IDs are excluded (ignored when include is set).
